description: Okta provides identity and access management software for organizations. The referenced MyAccount API lets an end user access information about their own Okta account, including the list of Okta-managed first-party applications available to them.
summary: One HTTP API surface on tenant-specific Okta domains: the MyAccount Okta Applications endpoint under `https://{yourOktaDomain}/idp/myaccount`, authenticated with a user OAuth 2.0 bearer token scoped `okta.myAccount.oktaApplications.read` and a required versioned `Accept` header.
